acceptanceCriteria: CHANGELOG.md renames the Unreleased heading to '## 0.7.1 - 2026-07-12' with the #24 entry unchanged beneath it and no other content change.
npm run test:all passes on the release tree; dist/rigor.cjs is unchanged (no src change in this release).
rigor release-check --version 0.7.1 passes on the merged main SHA after the release PR merges, before tagging.
constraints: Mechanical release change only: no source, schema, docs, workflow, or dist edits.
Do not create keys, secrets, attestations, or GitHub configuration, and do not increase any workflow permission.
Do not describe the release as attested or as carrying provenance; ADR 0001 is documentation only in this release.
